goal: Ensure human feedback and self-filed improvement issues enter the existing harness patch lifecycle as auditable state patches.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- evolve harness feedback --summary 'reduce repeated context misses' --kind prompt_policy --risk low --dry-run
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- evolve harness issue --title 'track DeepSeek repair churn' --kind eval --risk low --dry-run
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Feedback and improvement ideas live outside state, so they cannot be linked to evidence, evaluated, promoted, rejected, or rolled back through the harness lifecycle.
